title: AN AACT RENAMING THE SAGRADA-LIDONG ROAD EXTENDING FROM THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO THE PROVINCE OF ALBAY AS DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL HIGHWAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 4084 / 103 OG No. 44, 7084 (Oct. 29, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9488, June 24, 2007 ]

AN AACT RENAMING THE SAGRADA-LIDONG ROAD EXTENDING FROM THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO THE PROVINCE OF ALBAY AS DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL HIGHWAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Sagrada â Lidong Road extending from Sagrada, Buhi in the Province of Camarines Sur to Lidong, Polangui in the Province of Albay is hereby renamed as Diosdado Macapagal Highway.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 6, 2005 and February 19, 2007, respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved:

GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines

Lapsed into law on JUN 24 2007 without the signature of the President, in accordance with Article VI, Section 27 (1) of the Constitution.
